subcodes.first_line: O my God! Every leaf among the leaves of the Tree of Thy love desireth that the winds of Thy mercy should pass over it; therefore it behooveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی کل ورقه من اوراق سدره حبک ارادت ان تمر علیها اریاح رحمتک لذا ینبغی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom
